## Summary

Describe the feature request.

## Motivation

Why is this useful for correctness, coverage, or performance?

## Proposed API / Module Shape

List proposed files/functions.

## Correctness Requirements

Describe rounding rules, overflow behavior, and failure semantics.

## Test Plan

How will the feature be validated?

## References

Specs, docs, or canonical implementations.
